mapper.sql: ct.id, ct.customer_id, c.customer_code, ct.contact_code, ct.full_name, ct.email, ct.phone, ct.role_title, ct.status
mapper.select: SELECT FROM contact ct INNER JOIN customer c ON c.id = ct.customer_id WHERE ct.is_deleted = FALSE AND (LOWER(ct.contact_code) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(ct.full_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(ct.role_title) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(c.customer_code) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%')) ORDER BY ct.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contact ct INNER JOIN customer c ON c.id = ct.customer_id WHERE ct.is_deleted = FALSE AND (LOWER(ct.contact_code) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(ct.full_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(ct.role_title) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(c.customer_code) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%'))
SELECT FROM contact ct INNER JOIN customer c ON c.id = ct.customer_id WHERE ct.id = #{id} AND ct.is_deleted = FALSE
SELECT FROM contact ct INNER JOIN customer c ON c.id = ct.customer_id WHERE ct.contact_code = #{contactCode} AND ct.is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO contact (tenant_id, customer_id, contact_code, full_name, email, phone, role_title, status) VALUES (1, #{customerId}, #{contactCode}, #{fullName}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{roleTitle}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE contact SET customer_id = #{request.customerId}, contact_code = #{request.contactCode}, full_name = #{request.fullName}, email = #{request.email}, phone = #{request.phone}, role_title = #{request.roleTitle}, status = #{request.status}, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE contact SET is_deleted = TRUE, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
